revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from category navigation |name=From a template-generated category |from=a category name that is generated by default by a template of any kind, but where that category is now invalid in favour of the target category, and the template is able to [[Template:Resolve category redirect|resolve the category name using this redirect]] |info=**Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to use this category directly has been demonstrated) nor delete this page. **This template should only be used on categories which have also been soft-redirected via {{t|Category redirect}}. |main category= }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from category navigation |name=From a template-generated category |from=a category name that is generated by default by a template of any kind, but where that category is now invalid in favour of the target category, and the template is able to [[Template:Resolve category redirect|resolve the category name using this redirect]] |info=**Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to use this category directly has been demonstrated) nor delete this page. **This template should only be used on categories which have also been soft-redirected via {{t|Category redirect}}. |main category= }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from category navigation |name=From a template-generated category |from=a category name that is generated by default by a template of any kind, but where that category is now invalid in favour of the target category, and the template is able to [[Template:Resolve category redirect|resolve the category name using this redirect]] |info=**Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to use this category directly has been demonstrated) nor delete this page. **This template should only be used on categories which have also been soft-redirected via {{t|Category redirect}}. |main category= }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from category navigation |name=From a template-generated category |from=a category name that is generated by default by a template of any kind, but where that category is now invalid in favour of the target category, and the template is able to [[Template:Resolve category redirect|resolve the category name using this redirect]] |info=**Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to use this category directly has been demonstrated) nor delete this page. **This template should only be used on categories which have also been soft-redirected via {{t|Category redirect}}. |main category= }}<noinclude>
